deliverables.title: Pulse x Community Task Plan — Artifact Outline
deliverables.description: Living outline of the Pulse x Community narrative and ICP strategy artifacts, with purpose, ownership, acceptance criteria, and ICP expectations.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse x Community Task Breakdown Steps 1–4/5 — Outline, ownership, and acceptance

deliverables.title: Pulse x Community Task Plan — Execution Checklist
deliverables.description: Executable checklist for the Pulse x Community narrative and ICP documents, including artifacts, owners, acceptance criteria, and ICP-specific examples/metrics.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse x Community Task Breakdown Step 5/5 — Compile task plan checklist

deliverables.title: Peptide Research Brief
deliverables.description: Research brief synthesizing peptide findings into Pulse's brand voice — FDA status, WADA classifications, market analysis, and consumer safety considerations.
deliverables.taskRef: Sage Task #4 — Draft a research brief synthesizing findings into Pulse's brand voice

deliverables.title: Peptide Whitepaper Outline
deliverables.description: Proposed outline segment for the peptide whitepaper — structured sections covering science, regulation, market landscape, and Pulse's positioning.
deliverables.taskRef: Sage Task #5 — Propose an outline segment for the whitepaper

deliverables.title: Pulse Health Narrative Spine — Audience & Purpose
deliverables.description: Defines who the Pulse Health Narrative Spine is for, what it is meant to do, and where it should be referenced across decks, playbooks, and partner communications.
deliverables.taskRef: Health Narrative Spine Step 1/6 — Clarify audience and purpose

deliverables.title: Pulse-fit Community Partner Criteria
deliverables.description: Defines explicit Pulse-fit criteria and disqualifiers for Brands, Gyms/Studios, and Run Clubs, including creator activity, challenge behavior, and community location clarity.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list Step 1/5 — Define criteria by ICP

deliverables.title: Pulse-fit Community Partner Candidate Pool
deliverables.description: Broad candidate pool for Brands, Gyms/Studios, and Run Clubs with first-pass screening against Pulse-fit behavioral criteria.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list Step 2/5 — Assemble and screen candidate pool

deliverables.title: Pulse-fit Community Partner Behavioral Signals
deliverables.description: Shortlisted brands, gyms/studios, and run clubs with concrete (currently unverified) behavioral signals on creators, challenge cadence, and community channels.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list Step 3/5 — Behavioral signal capture

deliverables.title: Pulse-fit Community Partner Fit Tiering
deliverables.description: Assigns Flagship-ready vs Future-fit (Hypothesis) tiers to shortlisted partners by ICP, with explicit disconfirming signals and risks.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list Step 4/5 — Fit tier tagging

deliverables.title: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list
deliverables.description: Final A-list by ICP (Brands, Gyms/Studios, Run Clubs) with structured partner profiles: ecosystem summary, behavioral signals (Unverified), channels, fit tier, and Pulse fit sentence.
deliverables.taskRef: Pulse-fit Community Partners A-list Step 5/5 — Compile structured A-list

deliverables.title: PulseCheck Activation Proof Path Contract
deliverables.description: Defines the exact source-of-truth activation proof path and the additional post-activation conditions required before a canary container counts as downstream invite-ready.
deliverables.taskRef: Verify the activation proof path and downstream invite readiness contract — Step 1/3 research and plan
